news_items.headline: How Claude Code Works
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 141K views] Claude Code runs on an "agentic" loop that gathers context, takes action, and verifies results.

In this video, we break down the loop, the context window, tools, and permission modes so that Claude Code doesn't feel like a "magic box".

Take the full course: claude.com/courses

news_items.headline: Installing Claude Code
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 88K views] Claude Code can be installed in almost anywhere you develop. This can be: in the terminal, VS Code, JetBrains, Claude Desktop, or on the web.

We walk you through installation steps for each platform and help you pick the right one based on your use case.

news_items.headline: How Anthropic uses Claude in Cybersecurity
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 18K views] Security teams drown in alerts, jumping between tools and query languages for every investigation. Jackie Bow, Technical Lead on Anthropic's Detection Platform Engineering team, shares how her team used Claude Code to build CLUE—a threat detection platform that automates alert triage and cuts investigations from hours to minutes, powered by Claude Sonnet and Opus models.

Check out the full case study to learn more: www.claude.com/blog/how-anthropic-uses-claude-cybersecurity

news_items.headline: New ChatGPT Model & Memory Features Explained (AI News You Can Use)
news_items.summary:
[The AI Advantage · 17K views] Subscribe for more weekly updates on the AI news you'll actually use!

In this video, Igor breaks down the big updates from OpenAI including a new default model for all users in ChatGPT called GPT-5.5 Instant plus some important updates to how Memories function. He shows off some live testing, benchmark results from the AI Advantage research team, and ends the video by covering some smaller stories that he feels should still be on your radar. Enjoy!
